item.title: 曝 OpenAI 首款硬件将是可移动、无屏幕 AI 音箱
item.guid: 曝-OpenAI-首款硬件将是可移动、无屏幕-AI-音箱
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, OpenAI plans to launch a mobile, screenless smart speaker, serving as a "home computer" and AI companion for the age of artificial intelligence. The device is still under development and is expected to be announced this year and released next year. 据彭博社报道，OpenAI 计划推出一款可移动、无屏幕的智能音箱，作为面向人工智能时代的「家庭计算机」和 AI 伴侣。该设备仍在研发中，预计今年公布、明年上市。

The report states that this device will support functions such as controlling smart homes, playing media, answering questions, and processing messages, with access to ChatGPT's capabilities. The product is equipped with a camera and other sensors to understand the user's environment and context; a built-in battery allows users to move it between different rooms in their home. 报道称，这款设备将支持控制智能家居、播放媒体、回答问题、处理消息等功能，并接入 ChatGPT 的能力。产品配备摄像头及其他传感器，可理解用户所处环境和上下文；内置电池则允许用户将其在家中不同房间之间移动。

OpenAI also hopes that as the device is used more, it will gradually understand users and provide more personalized, proactive services, such as actively pushing information or predicting user needs. OpenAI 还希望设备能够随着使用时间增加，逐步了解用户并提供更个性化、主动式的服务，例如主动推送信息或预测用户需求。

In terms of interaction, the device will use a more advanced ChatGPT Voice Mode version, GPT-Live, supporting simultaneous listening and responding, making conversations closer to natural communication. The device also incorporates a self-moving mechanical structure to create a 'lifelike' feeling. 在交互方面，该设备将使用更先进的 ChatGPT Voice Mode 版本 GPT-Live，支持同时聆听和回应，并让对话更接近自然交流。设备还加入了可自行移动的机械结构，以营造「像活着一样」的感觉。

Reports indicate that OpenAI's hardware division is currently developing about 5 products, with future considerations for mobile AI devices that can replace smartphones, wearable products like pendants, and home robots. 报道称，OpenAI 硬件部门目前正在开发约 5 款产品，后续还考虑推出可替代智能手机的移动 AI 设备、吊坠等可穿戴产品，以及家用机器人。

At the same time, the product also faces legal risks. Apple recently sued OpenAI, accusing it of stealing trade secrets and demanding restrictions on OpenAI's hardware business. 同时，该产品也面临法律风险。苹果日前起诉 OpenAI，指控其窃取商业机密，并要求限制 OpenAI 的硬件业务。

OpenAI, on the other hand, stated that it 'has no intention of acquiring trade secrets from other companies' and currently 'has found no evidence to support this lawsuit.' OpenAI 则表示，自己「无意获取其他公司的商业机密」，目前也「没有发现这起诉讼具备依据的证据」。

item.title: DeepSeek 创始人梁文锋成为身家最高的 AI 模型创始人
item.guid: DeepSeek-创始人梁文锋成为身家最高的-AI-模型创始人
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, DeepSeek founder Liang Wenfeng's personal wealth is estimated to have increased to $36 billion, surpassing Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei's $8 billion and OpenAI co-founder and president Greg Brockman's $25.5 billion, making him currently the wealthiest AI model founder. 据彭博社报道，DeepSeek 创始人梁文锋的个人财富估值已增至 360 亿美元，高于 Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei 的 80 亿美元，以及 OpenAI 联合创始人兼总裁 Greg Brockman 的 255 亿美元，成为目前身家最高的 AI 模型创始人。

Liang Wenfeng's wealth growth primarily comes from his stake in DeepSeek. DeepSeek completed $7.4 billion in financing in June this year, with the company valuation reaching $50 billion; Liang Wenfeng personally invested $3 billion, and his shareholding was diluted to approximately 78% after the financing. Compared to the initial reported valuation of $10 billion in April this year, DeepSeek's valuation has increased by approximately 5 times. 梁文锋的财富增长主要来自其对 DeepSeek 的持股。DeepSeek 在今年 6 月完成 74 亿美元融资，公司估值达到 500 亿美元；梁文锋个人投入 30 亿美元，持股比例在融资后摊薄至约 78%。相比今年 4 月最初报道的 100 亿美元估值，DeepSeek 的估值提升约 5 倍。

Separately, according to the Financial Times, DeepSeek began preliminary contact with new investors this week to discuss a new round of financing, with a pre-money valuation of approximately $71 billion (about 481.39 billion RMB), an increase of about 37% from its first round of financing valuation. 另据《金融时报》报道，DeepSeek 本周开始与新的投资者展开初步接触，讨论开启新一轮融资，投前估值约为 710 亿美元（约合人民币 4813.9 亿元），较其首轮融资估值提升约 37%。

item.title: 小米机器人汽车工厂「实习」4 个月：拧螺母成功率提升至 98%，差 1%「转正」
item.guid: 小米机器人汽车工厂「实习」4-个月：拧螺母成功率提升至-98%，差-1%「转正」
item.description:
Xiaomi Technology announced yesterday that after 4 months of 'internship' for Xiaomi robots in a car factory, the success rate of double-sided operations at the self-tapping nut loading station has increased to 98%, just 1% shy of the manual operation qualification rate to officially 'become a regular employee'. 小米技术昨日公布，小米机器人在汽车工厂「实习」满 4 个月后，自攻螺母上件工站双侧作业成功率已提升至 98%，较人工作业合格率相比，差 1% 正式「转正」。

Robots have also entered the logistics area of the final assembly workshop, performing tasks such as sorting side panels for the center console and folding and recycling material boxes, with both success rates reaching 90%. 机器人目前还进入总装车间物流区，执行中控台侧盖板排序和料箱折叠回收任务，两项成功率均达到 90%。

Among them, side panel sorting involves large-sized, irregularly shaped flexible workpieces, which robots can grasp and place through full-body motion control, dual-hand coordination, force sensing, and active compliance strategies; material box folding supports multi-robot collaborative operations and can synchronize task status through the factory's digital system. 其中，侧盖板排序涉及大尺寸、不规则柔性工件，机器人可通过全身运动控制、双手协同、力感知和主动柔顺策略完成抓取与放置；料箱折叠则支持多机器人协同作业，并可通过工厂数字化系统同步任务状态。

Xiaomi stated that robots currently still need to adjust the orientation of the boxes when folding them, and will subsequently upgrade their dexterous hands and force control algorithms to continue expanding into automotive manufacturing scenarios. 小米表示，机器人目前仍需在折叠料箱时调整箱体方向，后续将升级灵巧手和力控算法，继续拓展汽车制造场景。

item.title: 三星、苹果份额逆势增长，全球手机市场第二季度下滑 4%
item.guid: 三星、苹果份额逆势增长，全球手机市场第二季度下滑-4%
item.description:
The latest research report from market research firm Omdia shows that global smartphone shipments in Q2 2026 decreased by 4% year-on-year, with tight memory supply driving up component costs, and the mass market of $400 and below being the most affected. 市场研究机构 Omdia 最新研报显示，2026 年第二季度全球智能手机出货量同比下降 4%，内存供应紧张推高零部件成本，400 美元及以下的大众市场受到的冲击最明显。

    Samsung: Shipment market share was 22%, an increase of 2 percentage points year-on-year, ranking first. The delayed release of the Galaxy S26 series led to some demand being postponed, and Samsung's supply performance in the mid-to-low-end market was also relatively stable.

    Apple: Market share was 20%, an increase of 4 percentage points year-on-year, setting a new historical high for the second quarter. Omdia stated that the iPhone 17 series drove strong upgrade demand, maintaining relatively stable pricing while other manufacturers generally increased prices.

    Xiaomi: Ranked third with an 11% share, lower than 15% in the same period last year.

    OPPO: Ranked fourth with a 10% share.

    vivo: Ranked fifth with an 8% share.

Omdia stated that the memory cost for some manufacturers has reached 4 to 5 times that of a year ago, with memory and storage accounting for over 60% of the bill of materials for entry-level phones. Memory prices are expected to start falling in the second half of 2027 at the earliest, but are unlikely to return to pre-2025 levels. Omdia 表示，部分厂商的内存成本已达到一年前的 4 至 5 倍，内存与存储占入门级手机物料成本的比例超过 60%。预计内存价格最早于 2027 年下半年开始回落，但不太可能恢复到 2025 年之前的水平。

item.title: 呼和浩特文联确认摄影一等奖作品由 AI 生成
item.guid: 呼和浩特文联确认摄影一等奖作品由-AI-生成
item.description:
The Hohhot Federation of Literary and Art Circles announced that the first prize-winning work 'Sa Le Yuan Lin' from the 2025 Hohhot Public Photography Bi-monthly Competition was confirmed by investigation to be AI-generated, not an original real-scene photograph by the author. 呼和浩特市文联通报，2025 年呼和浩特全民摄影双月赛一等奖作品《洒乐园林》经调查确系 AI 生成，并非作者实景原创拍摄。

The organizer has canceled the eligibility for participation, evaluation, and exhibition of the works, revoked relevant competition recognitions, suspended the photography biennial, and initiated rectification. 主办方已取消作品参赛、参评及参展资格，撤销相关赛事认定，暂停该摄影双月赛并开展整改。

Previously, some netizens discovered garbled text on the sanitation worker's vest in the work, questioning whether the work was genuinely photographed. The Hohhot Federation of Literary and Art Circles admitted in its announcement that the competition's review process was not strict enough and the selection criteria were not clearly defined, stating that it would strengthen subsequent competition reviews. 此前，有网友发现作品中环卫工马甲上的文字出现乱码，质疑作品并非真实拍摄。呼和浩特市文联在通报中承认赛事审核把关不严、评选标准界定不准，并表示将加强后续赛事审核。

item.title: 享界 G9 获批北京 L3 级自动驾驶道路测试牌照
item.guid: 享界-G9-获批北京-L3-级自动驾驶道路测试牌照
item.description:
Yesterday, the Luxeed G9 was approved for an L3 autonomous driving road test license in Beijing, becoming the first model to receive an L3 autonomous driving road test license in Beijing for speeds up to 120 km/h. 昨天，享界 G9 获批北京市 L3 级自动驾驶道路测试牌照，成为首款获批北京市时速 120 公里 L3 级自动驾驶道路测试牌照的车型。

The official statement indicates that the vehicle adopts a fusion solution of lidar, vision, and millimeter-wave radar, and has completed verifications such as simulation, closed-field testing, functional safety, intended functional safety, cybersecurity, and data security. 官方表示，该车采用激光雷达、视觉和毫米波雷达融合方案，并已完成模拟仿真、封闭场地、功能安全、预期功能安全、网络安全与数据安全等验证。

The license covers night scenarios, supports speeds up to 120km/h on expressways, and enables navigation lane changes, efficiency lane changes, and safety lane changes. Relevant test arrangements and system capabilities are still subject to Beijing's road test management requirements. 牌照覆盖夜间场景，高快速路最高支持 120km/h，并支持导航变道、效率变道和安全变道。相关测试安排和系统能力仍以北京市道路测试管理要求为准。

item.title: 曝一加或将退出欧美市场，OPPO 计划扩大欧洲业务
item.guid: 曝一加或将退出欧美市场，OPPO-计划扩大欧洲业务
item.description:
According to GSMArena, a source claims that OnePlus (一加) and OPPO may announce "fundamental adjustments" this week: OnePlus will exit key markets such as Europe and the United States, while OPPO plans to expand its business in Europe to fill the market gap left by OnePlus's departure. 据 GSMArena 报道，一名消息人士称，OnePlus（一加）与 OPPO 可能在本周宣布「根本性调整」：一加将退出欧洲和美国等关键市场，OPPO 则计划扩大在欧洲的业务，以填补一加退出后的市场空缺。

The report states that software updates and after-sales support for existing OnePlus devices will continue until the end of their respective lifecycles. Remaining inventory is expected to be sold out within the coming weeks to months, and no new OnePlus products will temporarily enter the European and US markets. As for whether inventory will be replenished or new phones launched subsequently, there is no clear information yet. 报道称，一加现有设备的软件更新和售后支持将持续至各自生命周期结束，剩余库存预计会在未来数周至数月内售出，欧洲和美国市场暂时不会再有新的 OnePlus 产品进入。至于后续是否会补充库存、推出新机，目前尚未有明确消息。

In the Chinese market, OnePlus may become a sub-brand under OPPO, primarily focusing on low-cost smartphones and tablets. 在中国市场，一加可能转为 OPPO 旗下的子品牌，主要聚焦低价智能手机和平板电脑。

The report suggests that if this adjustment is true, the OnePlus 15 might become the brand's last flagship product. 报道认为，如果此次调整属实，一加 15 可能成为该品牌最后一款旗舰产品。

item.title: 逐际动力完成近 2 亿美元 Pre-IPO 融资，半年累计融资 4 亿美元
item.guid: 逐际动力完成近-2-亿美元-Pre-IPO-融资，半年累计融资-4-亿美元
item.description:
LimX Dynamics, a general-purpose humanoid robot company, announced the completion of a nearly $200 million Pre-IPO round of financing. Over the past six months, the company has cumulatively raised $400 million, with participants including IDG Capital, Lens Technology, GGG Group, Huashan Capital, and Hefei Binhu Industrial Investment Group. 通用人形机器人公司逐际动力 LimX Dynamics 宣布完成近 2 亿美元 Pre-IPO 轮融资。过去半年，公司累计完成融资 4 亿美元，参与方包括 IDG 资本、蓝思科技、GGG Group、华山资本和合肥滨湖产发集团等。

UAE-based Leishi Capital has made additional investments in multiple consecutive rounds, and existing shareholders such as Oasis Capital, Cornerstone Capital, Nanshan Strategic Emerging Industries Investment, Shangqi Capital, and NIO Capital also participated in this round of financing. The company's post-investment valuation in this round is approximately 15 billion yuan. 阿联酋磊石资本连续多轮追加投资，绿洲资本、基石资本、南山战新投、尚颀资本和蔚来资本等老股东也参与本轮融资。公司本轮投后估值约 150 亿元。

item.title: 爱诗科技完成 29.8 亿元 C 轮融资
item.guid: 爱诗科技完成-29.8-亿元-C-轮融资
item.description:
Aisys Technology announced the completion of its overall Series C financing, with a cumulative funding of 2.98 billion RMB in this round. The company stated that the funds will primarily be used for video generation foundational models, real-time world models, global product growth, and industrial scenario implementation. 爱诗科技宣布完成整体 C 轮融资，本轮累计融资 29.8 亿元人民币。公司表示，资金将主要用于视频生成基础模型、实时世界模型、全球化产品增长和产业场景落地。

The company's previous business focus included video generation models, world models for real-time interaction, and related application products. This round of financing will cover model R&D, product growth, and industrial client implementation. 公司此前的业务重点包括视频生成模型、面向实时交互的世界模型以及相关应用产品，本轮融资将覆盖模型研发、产品增长和产业客户落地。

item.title: 💡 微软 CEO 纳德拉：企业用 AI，可能培养出自己的竞争对手
item.guid: 💡-微软-CEO-纳德拉：企业用-AI，可能培养出自己的竞争对手
item.description:
Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella recently published a blog post, warning that as enterprises use AI, the model providers they rely on could eventually acquire enough business knowledge to become potential competitors to those enterprises. 微软 CEO Satya Nadella 日前发布博客，他警告称，企业使用 AI 的过程中，所依赖的模型提供商最终可能掌握足够多的业务知识，成为企业潜在的竞争对手。

Nadella stated that enterprises effectively "pay twice" when using AI: once for the token fees of model services, and another time for the proprietary knowledge surrendered to make the model work. Nadella 表示，企业使用 AI 时实际上「付了两遍钱」：一次是模型服务的 token 费用，另一次则是为让模型发挥作用而交出的专有知识。

The more enterprises want models to understand their business, the more internal data they need to input. Prompt words, tools invoked by agents, and corrections made by employees to model errors may also continuously expose the enterprise's operating methods and decision-making standards. 企业越希望模型理解自身业务，就越需要输入更多内部资料，而提示词、智能体调用的工具，以及员工对模型错误作出的修正，也可能持续暴露企业的经营方式和决策标准。

Models learn from "usage traces," including prompts entered by people, tools used by agents, and especially corrections made when models make mistakes. Each correction ultimately accumulates as internal enterprise knowledge.

In Nadella's view, this type of knowledge represents business experience that competitors find difficult to acquire directly, yet it can be gradually obtained by model providers as enterprises use AI over the long term. Model providers can thus not only understand how clients operate but also use this information to enter the same business areas, creating competition with their original clients. 在 Nadella 看来，这类知识是竞争对手很难直接购买的业务经验，却可能在企业长期使用 AI 的过程中被模型提供商逐步获取。模型提供商由此不仅了解客户如何运营，还可能借助这些信息进入相同业务领域，与原客户形成竞争。

He believes that it is unequal for model providers to use public data to train models while restricting clients from studying model capabilities through "distillation." 他认为，模型提供商可以利用公共数据训练模型，却限制客户通过「蒸馏」研究模型能力，这种做法并不对等。

In response, he suggests that enterprises retain ownership of data such as prompts, feedback, evaluation results, and business context, establish a dedicated learning environment in the cloud, and access different models through an orchestration layer to avoid over-reliance on a single vendor. 作为应对，他建议企业保留提示词、反馈、评估结果和业务上下文等数据的所有权，并在云端建立专属学习环境，同时通过编排层接入不同模型，避免过度依赖单一供应商。

item.title: 1299 元起，REDMI Note 17 系列发布
item.description:
Yesterday, the REDMI Note 17 was officially released, with the 6GB+128GB version starting at 1299 yuan, available in Light Water Green, Black, and Meteor Purple. 昨天，REDMI Note 17 正式发布，6GB+128GB 版本起售价为 1299 元，提供浅水青、黑色和流星紫三种配色。

The REDMI Note 17 features a 7-inch 1080P OLED screen, supporting a 120Hz refresh rate, 1800 nits peak brightness, DCI-P3 wide color gamut, and Xiaomi's Qingshan eye protection technology, with a contrast ratio of 5,000,000:1. REDMI Note 17 配备 7 英寸 1080P OLED 屏幕，支持 120Hz 刷新率、1800 尼特峰值亮度、DCI-P3 广色域和小米青山护眼技术，对比度为 500 万:1。

In terms of battery life, the device is equipped with an 8000mAh Xiaomi Jinshajiang battery, with an energy density of 821Wh/L, supporting 45W wired fast charging and 22.5W wired reverse charging. 续航方面，该机搭载容量为 8000mAh 的小米金沙江电池，能量密度为 821Wh/L，支持 45W 有线快充和 22.5W 有线反向充电。

In terms of configuration, the REDMI Note 17 is powered by Qualcomm's 4th generation Snapdragon 4 mobile platform, with a CPU clock speed of up to 2.3GHz, a 50-megapixel main rear camera, and an 8-megapixel front camera. 配置方面，REDMI Note 17 搭载高通第四代骁龙 4 移动平台，CPU 主频最高为 2.3GHz，后置 5000 万像素主摄，前置 800 万像素摄像头。

The REDMI Note 17 Pro, released alongside it, starts at 1599 yuan, featuring a 9000mAh battery and a Snapdragon 6s Gen 4 processor. 同台发布的 REDMI Note 17 Pro 起售价 1599 元，搭载 9000mAh 电池和骁龙 6s Gen 4 处理器。

item.title: 三星预告 AI Galaxy Watch，称将采用全新内部组件
item.guid: 三星预告-AI-Galaxy-Watch，称将采用全新内部组件
item.description:
According to SamMobile, Samsung has begun teasing its next-generation Galaxy Watch smartwatch, calling it an "AI-powered health companion." Samsung stated that the new Galaxy Watch will provide smarter health insights through AI, helping users understand and actively manage their health in real-time. 据 SamMobile 报道，三星已开始预热新一代 Galaxy Watch 智能手表，称其将成为「AI 驱动的健康伴侣」。三星表示，新款 Galaxy Watch 将通过 AI 提供更智能的健康洞察，帮助用户实时了解并主动管理自身健康状况。

Samsung also mentioned that the new watch will feature "new internal components" and have longer battery life to support longer and more precise health tracking. 三星还提到，新款手表将搭载「全新的内部组件」，并拥有更长的续航时间，以支持更长时间、更精准的健康追踪。

According to previous reports, the Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 may feature a larger capacity battery, increasing by several hundred mAh compared to the current Galaxy Watch Ultra, and may be equipped with Qualcomm's new generation Snapdragon Wear Elite chip. 据此前报道，Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 可能配备容量更大的电池，相比现款 Galaxy Watch Ultra 增加约数百 mAh，并可能搭载高通新一代 Snapdragon Wear Elite 芯片。

The new products are expected to be officially unveiled on July 22 at the Galaxy Unpacked event, alongside new phone releases. 新品预计于 7 月 22 日举行的 Galaxy Unpacked 活动上，随手机新品一同正式发布。

item.title: 全球首款可变形机器人将在 WAIC 首秀
item.guid: 全球首款可变形机器人将在-WAIC-首秀
item.description:
Qiyuan Robotics released Qiyuan T1 (Transformer 1), which can autonomously switch between wheeled-bipedal and quadrupedal forms, for scenarios such as home companionship, outdoor travel, and mobile photography. The wheeled-bipedal form is for indoor movement, while the quadrupedal form is for outdoor conditions like grass, gravel, slopes, and stairs. 启元机器人发布启元 T1（Transformer 1），可在轮足人形和四足形态之间自主切换，用于家庭陪伴、户外出行和移动拍摄等场景。轮足人形形态面向室内移动，四足形态用于草地、砂石、斜坡和台阶等户外路况。

According to reports, Qiyuan T1 also supports linkage with action cameras, allowing for intelligent following, trajectory shooting, and multi-camera mounting via voice commands. The product will make its public debut during WAIC 2026, held from July 17 to 20. 据介绍，启元 T1 还支持与运动相机联动，可通过语音指令完成智能跟随、轨迹运镜和多机位搭载。产品将于 7 月 17 日至 20 日举行的 WAIC 2026 期间首次公开亮相。

item.title: 腾讯混元开源 Hy3 量化版本，单张 96GB 显卡即可部署
item.guid: 腾讯混元开源-Hy3-量化版本，单张-96GB-显卡即可部署
item.description:
The Tencent Hunyuan team has quantized the 295B parameter Hy3 model into 1bit and 4bit GGUF versions and released a corresponding llama.cpp deployment solution. The 1bit version's weights are compressed from nearly 600GB to 85.5GB, allowing it to run on a single inference graphics card with 96GB of VRAM; the 4bit version is 169.9GB, suitable for deployment on two inference graphics cards. 腾讯混元团队把 295B 参数的 Hy3 模型量化为 1bit 和 4bit GGUF 版本，并配套发布 llama.cpp 部署方案。1bit 版本的权重从接近 600GB 压缩到 85.5GB，单张 96GB 显存的推理显卡即可运行；4bit 版本为 169.9GB，适合两张推理显卡部署。

The team also added Hy3's MTP speculative decoding support to llama.cpp, which, when enabled, boosts the decoding speed of the 1bit version by approximately 50% and the 4bit version by nearly 60%. 团队还为 llama.cpp 加入 Hy3 的 MTP 投机解码支持，开启后 1bit 版本解码速度提升约 50%，4bit 版本提升接近 60%。

Official evaluations show that the 4bit version's performance on Agent, multilingual code, tool calling, and long-text understanding tasks is close to the original BF16 model, while the 1bit version also maintains minimal performance loss on long-text understanding, Agent, and code tasks. 官方评测显示，4bit 版本在 Agent、多语言代码、工具调用和长文理解任务上的表现接近 BF16 原始模型，1bit 版本在长文理解、Agent 和代码任务上也保持了较小的性能损失。

item.title: 高德发布 ABot-World Studio，把交互式视频与 3D 世界放进同一工坊
item.guid: 高德发布-ABot-World-Studio，把交互式视频与-3D-世界放进同一工坊
item.description:
Amap has released the general world model workshop ABot-World Studio and opened it for testing. Users can generate real-time interactive AI worlds by inputting text or images, with results savable as video and 3DGS files; the product supports local deployment on a single RTX 5090. 高德发布通用世界模型工坊 ABot-World Studio，并开放测试。用户输入文字或图片后，可以生成可实时交互的 AI 世界，结果可保存为视频和 3DGS 文件；产品支持在单张 RTX 5090 上本地部署。

According to reports, ABot-World Studio integrates both interactive video generation and 3D scene generation: the former supports continuous inference for over an hour, while the latter outputs 3D worlds with geometric structures, spatial depth, and physical boundaries. 据介绍，ABot-World Studio 同时整合交互式视频生成和 3D 场景生成：前者支持超过一小时的连续推理，后者输出带有几何结构、空间深度和物理边界的 3D 世界。

Each world can also embed "Anywhere Doors" to connect different generated scenes. The underlying ABot-World0 and ABot-3DWorld0 models have been open-sourced. 每个世界还可以嵌入「任意门」，把不同生成场景连接起来。底层 ABot-World0 与 ABot-3DWorld0 两个模型已开源。

item.title: LV 起诉国家知识产权局
item.description:
According to the People's Courts Announcement Network, the Beijing Intellectual Property Court will publicly hear a trademark administrative dispute case involving Louis Vuitton on July 16, case number (2026) Jing 73 Xing Chu 4727. The plaintiff is Louis Vuitton Malletier, the defendant is the National Intellectual Property Administration, and Huang Minyao is participating in the lawsuit as a third party. 人民法院公告网显示，北京知识产权法院将于 7 月 16 日公开审理一起涉及路易威登的商标行政纠纷案，案号为（2026）京 73 行初 4727 号。原告为路易威登马利蒂，被告为国家知识产权局，黄民耀作为第三人参加诉讼。

The announcement has not yet disclosed the trademarks involved or the specific content of the dispute. Louis Vuitton Malletier was also the plaintiff in a previous trademark infringement case against Jasmine Milk White, which is scheduled to open on July 16 at 9:30 AM in Courtroom 15 of the Beijing Intellectual Property Court. 公告暂未披露涉案商标和具体争议内容。路易威登马利蒂也是此前起诉茉莉奶白商标侵权案的原告，案件定于 7 月 16 日 9 时 30 分在北京知识产权法院第 15 法庭开庭。

item.title: 李锦记整合餐饮与新零售渠道管理
item.guid: 李锦记整合餐饮与新零售渠道管理
item.description:
According to Foodaily, Lee Kum Kee Sauces China has appointed Su Jilong as the head of the New Retail Operations Center, succeeding Zhang Yapin, who will depart in August this year. Su Jilong currently also serves as Vice President of Lee Kum Kee Sauce Group China, and head of the Professional Catering Operations Center and Channel & Route Management Center. 据小食代报道，李锦记酱料中国区已任命苏冀龙为新零售运营中心负责人，接替将于今年 8 月离开的张亚苹。苏冀龙目前还担任李锦记酱料集团中国区副总裁，以及专业餐饮运营中心、渠道及通路管理中心负责人。

Su Jilong joined Lee Kum Kee in December 2025, having previously worked at Amazon China, Alibaba, Shihuituan, and Meituan, with experience in e-commerce, community group buying, and instant retail. Following this adjustment, he will oversee the two major operation centers for professional catering and new retail, with business covering large catering merchants, key retail customers, traditional e-commerce, and instant retail. 苏冀龙于 2025 年 12 月加入李锦记，此前曾任职于亚马逊中国、阿里巴巴、十荟团和美团，拥有电商、社区团购和即时零售等业务经验。此次调整后，他将统管专业餐饮与新零售两大运营中心，业务覆盖大型餐饮商家、重点零售客户、传统电商和即时零售。

item.title: 《末日地堡》第三季确定上线时间，朱丽叶继续寻找记忆
item.guid: 《末日地堡》第三季确定上线时间，朱丽叶继续寻找记忆
item.description:
Apple TV+'s sci-fi series "Silo" Season 3 will be released around US Independence Day in 2027. The series is adapted from Hugh Howey's novel, and the third season continues to revolve around Juliette's memories and the underground facility. Apple TV+ 科幻剧集《末日地堡》第三季将在 2027 年美国独立日前后上线。该剧改编自 Hugh Howey 的小说，第三季继续围绕朱丽叶的记忆和地下设施展开。

Deadline reports that after Steve Zahn joined the second season, new characters will also appear in the third season. The series will continue to be broadcast on Apple TV+. Deadline 报道称，Steve Zahn 加盟第二季后，第三季还会出现新的角色。剧集仍由 Apple TV+ 播出。

The story of "Silo" is set with employees undergoing memory severance between work and private life, while Juliette attempts to understand the relationship between the underground facility and her own experiences. 《末日地堡》的故事设定是员工在工作和私人生活之间进行记忆切割，朱丽叶则试图理解地下设施和自身经历之间的关系。

item.title: 《精灵旅社 5》北美定档 2027 年 10 月 8 日
item.description:
"Hotel Transylvania 5" is scheduled to be released in North America on October 8, 2027, and concept art has been revealed. This will mark the series' return to the big screen after five years. The film will be co-directed by "Hotel Transylvania 4" director Jennifer Kluska and series animator Aaron Hawkins. 《精灵旅社 5》定档 2027 年 10 月 8 日在北美上映，并曝光概念图。这将是该系列时隔五年回归大银幕。影片将由《精灵旅社 4》导演詹妮弗·克鲁斯卡与该系列动画师艾伦·霍金斯联合执导。

The film's story revolves around Dracula's life after retirement. After his daughter Mavis takes over Hotel Transylvania, a series of strange events plunge the hotel back into a tense atmosphere, leading Dracula and other monsters to embark on another adventure to uncover the secret behind the hotel's haunting. 影片故事围绕德古拉退休后的生活展开。女儿梅维斯接管精灵旅社后，一系列诡异事件让旅社重新陷入紧张氛围，德古拉与其他怪物因此再次踏上冒险旅程，试图揭开旅社闹鬼事件背后的秘密。
